1st.option.title: 1st: Is using old criteria for old achievements of Java Edition?
1st.option.description_1: You need achieve old criteria to complete achievements when this option turns on. It affect %s, %s, %s and %s.
1st.option.description_2: When you turn off this option, you can put cooked cod or cooked salmon to your inventory from campfire or smoking furnace to complete %s, need go to biomes added after Minecraft 1.12 to complete %s, can kill hostile mobs added after Minecraft 1.12 %s, cannot kill stray or wither skeleton from a long distance away to complete %s. When you turn on this option, you need do as actual requirements %s shows.
1st.option.warning: Warning: You must install the mod "%s" to make sure this option can affect %s, the download page of "%s" is here: %s
2nd.option.title: 2nd: What criteria do %s use?
2nd.option.description: You need burn a raw iron in normal furnace to complete %s when this option is %s, need burn a iron ore block in normal furnace to complete %s when this option is %s, need take the iron out of the furnace or blast furnace to complete %s when this option is %s.
